display.purpose: Landing-page hero and brand-scale headlines only.

title.purpose: App headings, cards, workbench panels, and form sections.

numeric.purpose: Weights, percentages, costs, lye, water, and quality values.

shadows.name: public-card-elevation
shadows.purpose: Marketing cards and lifted public preview panels.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Buttons, fields, borders, and color changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main local action for product workflows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-accent); color: white; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 20px; transition: color 150ms ease, background-color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-accent-hover); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action that should stay quieter than the main action.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-ink-soft); padding: 10px 16px; font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 20px; transition: color 150ms ease, background-color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--color-panel-strong); color: var(--color-ink-strong); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard dense product field with visible focus.
components.html: <label class="ds-field-label">Formula name<input class="ds-input" value="Winter olive bar" /></label>
components.css: .ds-field-label { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: var(--color-ink-soft); font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--color-line); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-field); color: var(--color-ink-strong); padding: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 14px; outline: 1px solid var(--color-field-outline); transition: outline-color 150ms ease, outline-width 150ms ease; } .ds-input:focus { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent); }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Authenticated product card used around dense work surfaces.
components.html:
Editable draft

Winter olive bar

Formula settings, calculation, and save actions stay grouped.
components.css: .ds-card { border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 14px; background: var(--color-panel); color: var(--color-ink); padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(60, 50, 30, 0.04), 0 12px 24px rgba(60, 50, 30, 0.07); font-family: var(--font-sans); } .ds-card h3 { margin: 8px 0 0; color: var(--color-ink-strong); font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-card p { margin: 8px 0 0; color: var(--color-ink-soft); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; } .ds-eyebrow { margin: 0; color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-ink) 76%, var(--color-ink-soft)); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Compact semantic status chip for formula state and quality context.
components.css: .ds-badge-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-success-soft); color: var(--color-success-strong); padding: 4px 12px; font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 16px; }

components.name: Numeric Row
components.description: Dense formula row with aligned percentages and weights.
components.css: .ds-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 56px 72px; gap: 12px; align-items: center; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-panel-strong); color: var(--color-ink); padding: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 14px; } .ds-row span { min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-row strong { color: var(--color-ink-strong); font-family: var(--font-numeric); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; text-align: right; }

narrative.overview: Soapkraft should feel like a calm, practical, professional bench for soap and cosmetic formulation. It carries natural warmth through cream, stone, and green, but it stays precise enough for lye calculations, formulation tables, costing, label signals, and compliance preparation.
keyCharacteristics: Warm laboratory neutrals with one relaxed green accent.
Dense, work-focused surfaces with clear hierarchy.
Tonal layering first, soft warm elevation second.
Numeric values use tabular monospace styling.
Compliance is visible and calm, never visually dominant by default.

rules.name: The Green Earns Attention Rule
rules.body: Living Green is for primary actions, selected states, focus, and meaningful state indicators. Do not use it as decoration.

rules.name: The Semantic Color Rule
rules.body: Amber, blue, red, and teal must explain state. They are not palette variety.

rules.name: The Structural Lines Rule
rules.body: Borders are allowed for tables, inputs, app shell separation, and dense grouped rows. Decorative colored side stripes are forbidden.

dos: Do use the tokens in resources/css/shared/soapkraft.css as the visual source of truth.
Do use Living Green for primary action, active state, and focus only.
Do use Chemistry Amber for lye, warning, and chemistry signals.
Do use numeric or the numeric font stack for weights, percentages, costs, lye, water, and quality values.
donts: Don't make Soapkraft look like an Etsy craft template.
Don't use generic SaaS card grids as the default landing or dashboard answer.
Don't use flashy AI gradients, gradient text, or neon dark lab sci-fi styling.
Don't use decorative handmade soap blog motifs, blobs, bubbles, leaf patterns, or soap textures as UI decoration.
